ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var serasaData = payload --- { razaoSocial: serasaData.razaoSocial default serasaData.nome default "", nomeFantasia: serasaData.nomeFantasia default serasaData.fantasia default "", situacaoCnpj: serasaData.situacao default serasaData.situacaoCnpj default "", dataFundacao: serasaData.dataAbertura default serasaData.dataFundacao default "", codigoCnaeFiscal: serasaData.cnaeFiscal default serasaData.codigoCnaeFiscal default "", codigoNaturezaJuridica: serasaData.naturezaJuridica default serasaData.codigoNaturezaJuridica default "", inscricaoEstadual: serasaData.inscricaoEstadual default "", ufRegistroIe: serasaData.uf default serasaData.ufRegistroIe default "", situacaoRegistroIe: serasaData.situacaoIe default serasaData.situacaoRegistroIe default "", porte: serasaData.porte default "", endereco: { logradouro: serasaData.logradouro default serasaData.endereco.logradouro default "", numero: serasaData.numero default serasaData.endereco.numero default "", bairro: serasaData.bairro default serasaData.endereco.bairro default "", cidade: serasaData.municipio default serasaData.endereco.cidade default "", uf: serasaData.uf default serasaData.endereco.uf default "", cep: serasaData.cep default serasaData.endereco.cep default "" } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "CNPJ nao encontrado", cnpj: vars.cnpj, status: 404 }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Timeout na consulta Serasa", cnpj: vars.cnpj, status: 504 }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Erro interno na consulta Serasa", cnpj: vars.cnpj, status: 500 }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "ok", service: "algar-serasa-api", version: "1.0.0", timestamp: now() }
